versions.version_description: Riptide by Vance Joy. Link for song- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uJ_1HMAGb4k .

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Vance Joy - Riptide


Intro:

[ch]Bbm[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]   (x2)


Verse

[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]Db[/ch]
I was scared of dentists and the dark[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]Db[/ch]
I was scared of pretty girls and starting conversations[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbm[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]                  [ch]Db[/ch]
Oh, all my friends are turning green[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bbm[/ch]          [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]Db[/ch]
You're the magician's assistant in their dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]Db[/ch]
Oh - Oh - Oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]           [ch]Db[/ch]
Oh - Oh, and they come unstuck[/tab]


Chorus

[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]                  [ch]Db[/ch]
Lady, running down to the riptide[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Taken away to the dark side[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Db[/ch]
I wanna be your left hand man[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]                       [ch]Db[/ch]
I love you when you're singing that song[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bbm[/ch]
And I got a lump in my throat[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Ab[/ch]                          [ch]Db[/ch]
'Cause you're gonna sing the words wrong[/tab]


Verse

[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                [ch]Ab[/ch]                  [ch]Db[/ch]
There's this movie that I think you'll like[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]            [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]Db[/ch]
This guy decides to quit his job and heads to New York City[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Db[/ch]
This cowboy's running from himself[/tab]

And she's been living on the highest shelf[/tab]

I just wanna, I just wanna know[/tab]
